title: Communicate business information in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Communicate business information in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Communicate information verbally

pcs.text: Determine purpose of verbal communication and choose communication style to suit audience requirements and purpose1.2 Deliver information verbally using clear, succinct and unambiguous language and required industry terminology1.3 Question listeners to verify that information provided has been received and understood as required1.4 Provide clarification, rephrasing or additional explanations as required1.5 Listen to verbal information received from others carefully, and clarify and confirm with the speaker as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine purpose of verbal communication and choose communication style to suit audience requirements and purpose1.2 Deliver information verbally using clear, succinct and unambiguous language and required industry terminology1.3 Question listeners to verify that information provided has been received and understood as required1.4 Provide clarification, rephrasing or additional explanations as required1.5 Listen to verbal information received from others carefully, and clarify and confirm with the speaker as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine purpose of verbal communication and choose communication style to suit audience requirements and purpose1.2 Deliver information verbally using clear, succinct and unambiguous language and required industry terminology1.3 Question listeners to verify that information provided has been received and understood as required1.4 Provide clarification, rephrasing or additional explanations as required1.5 Listen to verbal information received from others carefully, and clarify and confirm with the speaker as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Communicate information verbally

elements.title: Communicate information in writing

pcs.text: Determine purpose or objectives of written communication and choose communication style to suit audience and purpose 2.2 Draft written text using required vocabulary, grammatical structures and conventions 2.3 Structure text logically, format and present following workplace procedures2.4 Check text to confirm that key messages are clear, succinct and unambiguous and meet intended purpose2.5 Read written information received from others carefully and clarify information as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine purpose or objectives of written communication and choose communication style to suit audience and purpose 2.2 Draft written text using required vocabulary, grammatical structures and conventions 2.3 Structure text logically, format and present following workplace procedures2.4 Check text to confirm that key messages are clear, succinct and unambiguous and meet intended purpose2.5 Read written information received from others carefully and clarify information as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine purpose or objectives of written communication and choose communication style to suit audience and purpose 2.2 Draft written text using required vocabulary, grammatical structures and conventions 2.3 Structure text logically, format and present following workplace procedures2.4 Check text to confirm that key messages are clear, succinct and unambiguous and meet intended purpose2.5 Read written information received from others carefully and clarify information as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Communicate information in writing

elements.title: Communicate in meeting

pcs.text: Identify purpose of meeting and clarify as required3.2 Attend meeting and make positive contribution to outcomes according to workplace meeting procedures and own level of responsibility3.3 Carry out own responsibilities relating to meeting outcomes according to workplace meeting procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose of meeting and clarify as required3.2 Attend meeting and make positive contribution to outcomes according to workplace meeting procedures and own level of responsibility3.3 Carry out own responsibilities relating to meeting outcomes according to workplace meeting procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose of meeting and clarify as required3.2 Attend meeting and make positive contribution to outcomes according to workplace meeting procedures and own level of responsibility3.3 Carry out own responsibilities relating to meeting outcomes according to workplace meeting procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Communicate in meeting

elements.title: Present information to others

pcs.text: Identify and clarify purpose for presenting information to others and features of the target audience4.2 Plan information to be presented and organise logically4.3 Identify and select resources needed to present information 4.4 Check resources prior to presenting information to ensure that they are functioning properly4.5 Conduct presentation as planned and provide required responses to audience questions and feedback4.6 Review audience feedback on presentation to improve future practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and clarify purpose for presenting information to others and features of the target audience4.2 Plan information to be presented and organise logically4.3 Identify and select resources needed to present information 4.4 Check resources prior to presenting information to ensure that they are functioning properly4.5 Conduct presentation as planned and provide required responses to audience questions and feedback4.6 Review audience feedback on presentation to improve future practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and clarify purpose for presenting information to others and features of the target audience4.2 Plan information to be presented and organise logically4.3 Identify and select resources needed to present information 4.4 Check resources prior to presenting information to ensure that they are functioning properly4.5 Conduct presentation as planned and provide required responses to audience questions and feedback4.6 Review audience feedback on presentation to improve future practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Present information to others

elements.title: Discuss and resolve a workplace issue

pcs.text: Analyse key factors and issues relating to a workplace issue 5.2 Plan key discussion points and suitable approach to discussion 5.3 Conduct discussion according to planned approach with solutions or outcomes acceptable to both parties negotiated and agreed5.4 Carry out required follow-up action according to workplace procedures and further discussions with other parties conducted as required5.5 Document solutions or outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse key factors and issues relating to a workplace issue 5.2 Plan key discussion points and suitable approach to discussion 5.3 Conduct discussion according to planned approach with solutions or outcomes acceptable to both parties negotiated and agreed5.4 Carry out required follow-up action according to workplace procedures and further discussions with other parties conducted as required5.5 Document solutions or outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse key factors and issues relating to a workplace issue 5.2 Plan key discussion points and suitable approach to discussion 5.3 Conduct discussion according to planned approach with solutions or outcomes acceptable to both parties negotiated and agreed5.4 Carry out required follow-up action according to workplace procedures and further discussions with other parties conducted as required5.5 Document solutions or outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Discuss and resolve a workplace issue

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
